sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: The « Connect Now » application (hereinafter the « Application ») is made available to international students (hereinafter the « User(s) ») by DATKOM-INFORMATICS (hereinafter the « Publisher » or « we ») to help them better adapt and integrate in France.
These Terms govern the use of the mobile application and inform you of the means implemented by the Publisher to collect and process your personal data, with the strictest respect for your rights.
The User must read these Terms carefully before using the mobile application. By using the mobile application, the User unreservedly accepts these Terms.

sections.title: Definition and nature of personal data
paragraphs: When you use the application, we may ask you to provide personal data about yourself.
The term « personal data » refers to any data that allows an individual to be identified, including your first name, email address, location, and any other information you choose to share with us.

When using the Application, you may provide information about your profile, origin, geographic location, interests, etc. The Application aims to connect you with people who share a similar journey, and we use the information you provide and what we infer from your activity to prioritize the profiles most relevant to you.

sections.title: Identity of the data controller
paragraphs: The controller of the collection and processing of your personal data is the digital startup-in-formation DATKOM-INFORMATICS, specialized in designing innovative digital products.
DATKOM-INFORMATICS can be contacted at: bonjour@datkominformatics.com

sections.title: Access to the mobile application
paragraphs: The Application is available free of charge to all Users with a smartphone or tablet compatible with iOS or Android. The Publisher reserves the right to suspend, interrupt, or limit access to the Application, particularly for maintenance or update purposes.
The User is informed that the Application may be modified at any time by the Publisher, without notice or compensation.

sections.title: Content and use of the mobile application
paragraphs: The mobile application provides useful information about life in France for international students, including practical advice on administrative procedures, available financial aid, useful addresses, housing, health, employment, leisure, culture, etc.

The User agrees to use the Application in accordance with its purpose and applicable laws and regulations. In particular, the User shall not use the Application for unlawful purposes or purposes contrary to public order.
The User is informed that the Publisher cannot be held responsible for consequences related to fraudulent or abusive use of the Application.

sections.title: Personal data
paragraphs: The User is informed that the Publisher collects personal data concerning them when they use the Application.

This data is collected and processed in accordance with the Application's privacy policy. The User has the right to access, rectify, erase, and port their personal data, as well as the right to restrict and object to their processing. These rights may be exercised by writing to privacy@connectnow.fr.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: The mobile application and its content (texts, images, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software, etc.) are protected by intellectual property laws. The User may not copy, reproduce, modify, or distribute any part of the application content without the Publisher's prior authorization.

sections.title: Liability
paragraphs: The Publisher of the mobile application cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damages caused to the User or third parties as a result of using the mobile application or the inability to use it. The User is responsible for their use of the mobile application.
The User agrees, in their use of the application, to comply with applicable laws and regulations and not to infringe the rights of third parties or public order.
The User is solely responsible for their use of the Services, particularly relationships with other Users and information shared with them. They must exercise appropriate caution and judgment.
The User agrees to provide the Application with all information necessary for the proper execution of the Services and to actively cooperate with the Publisher.
They guarantee that all information provided during registration is accurate, up to date, and truthful and is not misleading.
They agree to update this information in their Personal Space when changes occur.

The User acknowledges and accepts that using the Services requires an internet connection and that the quality of the Services depends directly on this connection, for which they are solely responsible.

sections.title: Modifications
paragraphs: The Publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Modifications will apply as soon as they are published on the application. The User is invited to regularly review the Terms.

sections.title: Applicable law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by and interpreted in accordance with French law. Any dispute arising from the use of the application shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts. By using this application, the User acknowledges having read and unreservedly accepted these Terms.
